name: social
description: Agent-driven social media from inside Codex: use the social CLI to run outreach, posting, audience insights, inbox/DM triage, and account research across LinkedIn and X.

interface.shortDescription: Run distribution across LinkedIn and X.
interface.longDescription: Social lets Codex run distribution through the social CLI — search people and posts, read profiles, timelines, comments, reactions, companies, jobs, bookmarks, inboxes, and DMs, manage connected accounts, and post where enabled. One login, one bill; the agent runs the calls, you stay the decision-maker.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use the social CLI.
